title: UWF Archaeology Institute Survey Uncovers Pre-Columbian Artifacts Ahead of Stadium Infrastructure Work
description: Faculty researchers and archaeology students at the University of West Florida have uncovered artifacts linked to multiple pre-Columbian Native American cultures during a recent archaeological survey ...

title: Is your ‘sustainable’ super funding fossil fuels or weapons? How to check the fine print
description: If you care about particular issues – from climate change to weapons of war – it’s worth looking more closely at where your money is really going.

title: Ancient DNA reveals humans and dogs have lived alongside each other since the Ice Age
description: Evidence has revealed dogs were widespread across Europe and western Asia at least 14,000 years ago

title: Archaeology experiment probes mystery of Scotland's Book of Kells birthplace
description: The experiment could reveal where the unique 9th century relic was made

title: Trump Team Slapped With Suit For Snubbing Ancient Horseshoe Crabs
description: The Center for Biological Diversity says it will sue after NOAA declined Endangered Species Act protections for American horseshoe crabs amid rising harvest and habitat threats.
